name: Vegetarian Thai Spring Rolls
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Vegetable oil for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu, mushrooms, beans, celery, and carrot into large julienne slices.
2. Chop the green onions. Set aside.
3. In a wok over medium heat, heat 3 tablespoons vegetable oil. Stir-fry the garlic until it begins to brown. Add the soy sauce, tofu, and all the vegetables except the green onions. Stir-fry for 10 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat and add the green onions.
5. Separate the roll wrappers. Place the wrapper with the narrow side facing you. Put about a third of the filling (scant 1/4 cup) from the closest edge. Fold the closest edge to you over the filling, then fold over the left and right edges and roll. Seal the end using just a touch of water.
6. Place the finished rolls seam side down on a baking sheet. Repeat until all rolls are filled in this way.
7. Heat the vegetable oil for deep frying in a wok until hot. Deep-fry the rolls on each side until golden brown. Drain and serve hot with cucumber pickle.
